summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Aashwashan mental health website - both backend APIs and frontend UI. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend features tested and working correctly including booking flow, payment modal, contact forms, self-help tools, and navigation.

backend_api_tests.details: 14/14 tests passed - Health endpoints, Appointments CRUD, Contact form, Status checks all working

homepage.details: Header shows 'Aashwashan' with 'MENTAL HEALTH FOR ALL' tagline, all sections loading correctly

services_page.details: 'Do You Know What?' hero section displays correctly, 'Get Help With This' buttons (5 found) open booking modal

booking_modal.details: Modal shows 'Book What You Need Help With' title with 'It is Anonymous' badge, form submits successfully

upi_payment_modal.details: UPI payment modal shows after booking form submission with 'aashwashan@upi' UPI ID, 'I've Completed Payment' button works

contact_page.details: Shows care@aashwashan.com email, address '1289/6 Near Market Committee, Ambala City', contact form submits successfully

footer.details: Shows care@aashwashan.com and correct address '1289/6 Near Market Committee, Ambala City'

join_our_team_page.details: Form works correctly, no Position field (as required), has name/email/phone/experience/resume fields

breathing_exercise_modal.details: 4-4-4 Breathing Exercise modal opens with 'Start Exercise' button, voice guidance enabled

help_me_find_algorithm.details: 3-step algorithm popup works - select concern, duration, preference - recommends therapist with 'Book with [name]' button

whatsapp_button.details: WhatsApp floating button visible on bottom right corner

navigation.details: Navigation works between all pages - Home, About Us, Services, Contact Us, Join Our Team

seed_data_creation: Test appointments and contacts created during API testing with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs (appointments, contact, status) are functional and save to MongoDB. Email service is MOCKED (logs only). UPI payment is MOCKED (manual confirmation). Content data is mocked in mockData.js. Self-help tools (breathing exercise, gratitude journal) work client-side only.

mocked_apis_list: Email notifications (logs only, no actual SMTP)
UPI payment (manual confirmation, no actual payment processing)
Content data in mockData.js (services, team, testimonials, faqs)
